projectDescription: A keyboard-first, hierarchical window manager for Windows that replaces Alt+Tab with a searchable, folder-organized overlay built on C#, .NET 8, and WinUI 3.
keyFeatures: Smart Folders that auto-group windows by process name, class, or custom rules (AND/OR logic)
Real-time fuzzy search across all open windows with typo tolerance
App Launcher — launch installed apps when no window matches the query
Clipboard History panel showing recent text entries with pin support
Virtual Desktop awareness — shows desktop number and name per window
Live DWM thumbnail previews for each window
Full theme customization with semantic color tokens and named presets
Recycle Bin shortcut accessible directly from the overlay
Native WinUI 3 / .NET 8 runtime — no Electron, no web renderer
publicApiSurface: AppSettings — persisted settings model (hotkeys, appearance, folders, clipboard)
AppearanceSettings — 15 semantic color tokens for full theme customization
ThemePreset — named color scheme saved/loaded from settings
WindowFolder — folder model with FolderType enum (All, Manual, SmartProcess, SmartClass, SmartRules, Clipboard, RecycleBin)
FolderRuleGroup / FolderRuleCondition — composite AND/OR rule engine for Smart Folders
WindowInfo — window metadata (handle, title, process, class, desktop, pinned state)
FolderService.CreateSmartProcessFolder() — create a smart folder filtered by process name
FolderService.CreateSmartRulesFolder() — create a rule-based smart folder
FolderService.CreateClipboardFolder() — create the clipboard history folder
FolderService.CreateRecycleBinFolder() — create the Recycle Bin folder
HotkeyService.Configure(modifiers, vKey) — change the activation hotkey at runtime
HotkeyService.Install(DispatcherQueue) — install the low-level keyboard hook
UpdateService.CheckAsync() — check GitHub Releases for a newer version
UpdateService.DownloadAndInstallAsync() — download and launch the latest installer
VirtualDesktopService.EnrichWindows(List<WindowInfo>) — add virtual desktop metadata to windows
VirtualDesktopService.SwitchToWindowDesktop(IntPtr) — move a window to the current desktop
